p.strong: SWIM-style lifecycle with incarnation-based conflict resolution

g.title: Node is healthy and responding to pings
Ping failed; waiting for refutation or timeout
Confirmed failed; metadata retained for gossip propagation
Gracefully exited; metadata retained for gossip propagation

ol.li: Self-Refutation: If node receives SUSPECT(self) with incarnation $i$, it broadcasts ALIVE(self) with $i+1$.
Monotonicity: State updates with lower incarnation numbers are ignored.

ul.li: ALIVE overrides SUSPECT ONLY if $inc_{alive} > inc_{suspect}$.

tr.td: Entry does not exist in local map

div.p: [2] Suspect Transition Trigger: Direct Timeout + Indirect Nack Guard: Incarnation is current Action: Start suspicion_timer
[3] Refutation (Self-Heal) Trigger: Gossip Msg Received Guard: msg.incarnation > current Action: Clear suspicion_timer
[4] Failure Confirmation Trigger: timer.expired() Guard: No refutation within T_timeout Action: Broadcast Failure Notification
[5] Graceful Shutdown Trigger: SIGTERM / Syscall Action: Broadcast LEAVE(fanout=k)
[6] Garbage Collection Trigger: Periodic Reaper Guard: age > CleanupTTL

g.title: Node is healthy and responding to pings
Ping failed; waiting for refutation or timeout
Confirmed failed; metadata retained for gossip propagation
Gracefully exited; metadata retained for gossip propagation
